image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about sterilizing immunity.
Context visual: Sterilizing immunity means complete protection against infection. But how does it really work?
Escalation visual: When your body fights off a virus, it can develop this immunity. But it’s not always guaranteed.
Evidence visual: Some vaccines can provide sterilizing immunity, meaning they stop the virus from replicating.
Payoff visual: But emerging research shows not all infections trigger this. It’s a complex game.
Cta visual: Want to unlock more secrets of immunity? Hit like and follow for more science!
